description:
A DeepSeek-native coding agent, for your terminal.

Reasonix talks straight to api.deepseek.com. The loop is append-only, engineered around DeepSeek's byte-stable prefix cache — long sessions hold 90%+ cache hit and input-token cost collapses to ~1/5. Terminal-first, leave it running.
What's Changed
- Detect macOS main-thread hangs / 检测 macOS 主线程卡死 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/5911
- Fix desktop model switch lease recovery / 修复桌面端切模型会话租约恢复 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/5912
- Stabilize desktop topic ordering metadata / 修复桌面会话排序元数据 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/5921
- Fix display zoom recovery controls / 修复显示缩放恢复控件 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/5924
- Reduce desktop hydration metadata lag / 降低桌面端 hydrate 元数据卡顿 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/5925
- Fix provider-key rebuild lease handling / 修复 provider key 重建租约处理 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/5926
- fix(desktop): fix zoom slider capsule seam and correct frameless resize coordinates by @SauronSkywalker in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/5777
- Add LongCat provider presets / 新增 LongCat 供应商预设 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/5931
- Fix session rewrite recovery loops / 修复会话重写恢复分支循环 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/5922
- Fix desktop runtime lock inversions / 修复桌面运行时锁顺序问题 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/5920
- Fix npm CLI binary version injection / 修复 npm CLI 二进制版本注入 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/5939
- Harden Windows desktop update handoff / 强化 Windows 桌面端更新交接 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/5942
- Fix MCP tools/list startup race / 修复 MCP 工具列表启动竞态 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/5944
- Fix assistant turn copy range / 修复助手轮次复制范围 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/5946
- fix(desktop): recover orphaned session leases on model/effort/token switches / 修复单窗口切换模型/思考力度/省 token 误报"会话已被占用" by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/5948
- docs: remove defunct oosmetrics badges from READMEs by @esengine in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/5953
Full Changelog: https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/compare/desktop-v1.16.1...desktop-v1.16.2
